2605.12481.title: ToolCUA: Towards Optimal GUI-Tool Path Orchestration for Computer Use Agents
2605.12481.paper_summary: Computer Use Agents (CUAs) can act through both atomic GUI actions, such as click and type, and high-level tool calls, such as API-based file operations, but this hybrid action space often leaves them uncertain about when to continue with GUI actions or switch to tools, leading to suboptimal execution paths. This difficulty stems from the scarcity of high-quality interleaved GUI-Tool trajectories, the cost and brittleness of collecting real tool trajectories, and the lack of trajectory-level supervision for GUI-Tool path selection. In this paper, we propose ToolCUA, an end-to-end agent designed to learn optimal GUI-Tool path selection through a staged training paradigm. We first introduce an Interleaved GUI-Tool Trajectory Scaling Pipeline that repurposes abundant static GUI trajectories and synthesizes a grounded tool library, enabling diverse GUI-Tool trajectories without manual engineering or real tool-trajectory collection. We then perform Tool-Bootstrapped GUI RFT, combining warmup SFT with single-turn RL to improve decisions at critical GUI-Tool switching points. Finally, we optimize ToolCUA with Online Agentic RL in a high-fidelity GUI-Tool environment, guided by a Tool-Efficient Path Reward that encourages appropriate tool use and shorter execution paths. Experiments on OSWorld-MCP show that ToolCUA achieves 46.85% accuracy, a relative improvement of approximately 66% over the baseline, establishing a new state of the art among models of comparable scale. It also improves by 3.9% over GUI-only settings, demonstrating effective GUI-Tool orchestration. The results further suggest that training in a hybrid action space is a promising paradigm for real-world digital agents. Open-sourced here: https://x-plug.github.io/ToolCUA/
2605.12481.paper_summary_zh: 電腦使用代理（CUAs）可以通過原子 GUI 操作（如點擊和輸入）以及高級工具調用（如基於 API 的文件操作）來行動，但這種混合行動空間常常使它們不確定何時繼續進行 GUI 操作或切換到工具，導致次優的執行路徑。這一困難源於高質量交錯的 GUI-工具軌跡的稀缺、收集真實工具軌跡的成本和脆弱性，以及缺乏對 GUI-工具路徑選擇的軌跡級別監督。在本文中，我們提出了 ToolCUA，一個設計用於通過分階訓練範式學習最佳 GUI-工具路徑選擇的端到端代理。我們首先介紹了一個交錯的 GUI-工具軌跡縮放管道，該管道重新利用大量靜態 GUI 軌跡並合成一個基於實體的工具庫，使得在不需要手動工程或真實工具軌跡收集的情況下，能夠生成多樣的 GUI-工具軌跡。然後，我們執行工具引導的 GUI RFT，將預熱的 SFT 與單回合的 RL 結合在一起，以改善在關鍵的 GUI-工具切換點的決策。最後，我們在高保真度的 GUI-工具環境中通過在線代理強化學習優化 ToolCUA，並以工具高效路徑獎勵為指導，鼓勵適當的工具使用和更短的執行路徑。在 OSWorld-MCP 上的實驗顯示，ToolCUA 達到了 46.85% 的準確率，相較於基線約提高了 66%，在可比規模的模型中建立了新的最先進水平。它還比僅使用 GUI 的設置提高了 3.9%，顯示出有效的 GUI-工具協調。結果進一步表明，在混合行動空間中進行訓練是一種對於現實世界數位代理的有前景的範式。開源於此：https://x-plug.github.io/ToolCUA/
2605.12481.author: Xuhao Hu et.al.
2605.12481.authors: Xuhao Hu, Xi Zhang, Haiyang Xu, Kyle Qiao, Jingyi Yang, Xuanjing Huang, Jing Shao, Ming Yan, Jieping Ye
